title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Air India SATS Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Air India SATS Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Air India SATS Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Air India SATS Global Group:
Air India SATS Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India SATS Global Group!
